headline: Albemarle: Strategic Asset In Energy Security (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Albemarle (ALB) upgraded to Buy as lithium prices rebound. Proactive cost controls, capex cuts, and asset sales have preserved balance sheet strength. See more.
